message:
style(btree,ext-json): rustfmt whitespace and import ordering cleanup

table_seek_bug_test.rs:
- Reorder imports to place crate-local imports before external ones
  per rustfmt conventions.
- Replace trailing whitespace on blank lines with clean newlines.
- Remove trailing newline at end of file.

ext-json/lib.rs:
- Reformat multi-line assert_eq! and assert! calls for json_quote
  infinity and blob tests to comply with line-length limits.
- Remove unnecessary line break in sqlite_to_json BLOB error arm.
- Clean trailing whitespace in test_json_extract_no_paths_error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
